text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Nishino Flower completes today's training
session, she makes a request.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Trainer! Can I keep running just a little
longer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
After looking over my previous lap times, I
realized I've gotten faster!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And I guess that must have given me an extra
burst of motivation, because I just want to keep
going!
choice_data_list: That's the spirit! Run like wild!
That's the spirit! Run like wild!
You're going to wear yourself out.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And I guess that must have given me an extra
burst of motivation, because I just want to keep
going!
choice_data_list: That's the spirit! Run like wild!
That's the spirit! Run like wild!
You're going to wear yourself out.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: All right! I can go even faster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower happily continues running until the
sun sets.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's a good point... Too much training could
backfire on me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But then, what should I do about this urge to
become even faster?
choice_data_list: Running isn't the only way to train.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! That's right! I can study instead! Strategy
during a race is just as important speed, isn't it?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, could you spend some more time
teaching me today? I want to improve my racing
knowledge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Nishino Flower and I go over racing
tactics in my office until the sun sets.
